targets.query:
from(bucket: "k6")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "http_req_duration" and r._field == "value")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: (columns, tables=<-) => tables |> quantile(q: 0.95))
  |> yield(name: "p95")

from(bucket: "k6")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "http_reqs" and r._field == "value")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: count)
  |> yield(name: "rps")

import "math"

total = from(bucket: "k6")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "http_reqs" and r._field == "value")
  |> count()
  |> findRecord(fn: (key) => true, idx: 0)

failed = from(bucket: "k6")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "http_req_failed" and r._field == "value" and r._value == 1)
  |> count()
  |> findRecord(fn: (key) => true, idx: 0)

array.from(rows: [{_value: if total._value > 0 then float(v: failed._value) / float(v: total._value) * 100.0 else 0.0}])

from(bucket: "k6")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "vus" and r._field == "value")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: last)
  |> yield(name: "vus")

from(bucket: "k6")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "http_req_duration" and r._field == "value")
  |> group(columns: ["name"])
  |> quantile(q: 0.95)
  |> group()
  |> sort(columns: ["_value"], desc: true)
